overall.description: First-person gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character traversing elevated walkways and staircases in Night City at night. The clip features cyberpunk aesthetics with neon billboards, wet reflective surfaces, and futuristic architecture as the player moves between enclosed stairwells, open-air walkways, and tiled tunnels overlooking city streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed concrete stairwell with yellow-green lighting

agents.ego_description: climbing a concrete staircase with metal handrails in a dimly lit enclosed stairwell

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with dark edges ascending through the frame
silver metal handrail running along the left wall of the staircase
smooth yellow-green painted wall panels lining the stairwell

segments.scene_description: The clip begins in a narrow enclosed stairwell with yellow-green artificial lighting. The camera ascends concrete stairs with metal handrails, moving steadily upward through the dimly lit concrete structure with no other characters or vehicles visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway under building overhang with neon advertisements

events.description: exits enclosed stairwell onto elevated walkway revealing neon-lit cityscape

agents.ego_description: walking along an elevated walkway with glass railings, observing the neon cityscape and advertisements

entered.detail: transparent glass safety railing along the edge of the elevated walkway
large vertical billboard with purple and pink neon advertisement graphics
multi-lane street visible below the elevated walkway with moving vehicle lights
tall palm tree visible against the night sky beyond the railing

segments.scene_description: Exiting the stairwell, the scene opens onto an elevated walkway with glass railings overlooking the city. Neon billboards illuminate the area with purple and pink light, while palm trees and distant skyscrapers become visible against the night sky. The walkway surface is tiled and reflective.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air elevated walkway overlooking multi-lane street

events.description: turns right along the curved elevated walkway following the building contour

agents.ego_description: continuing along the curved elevated walkway, passing palm trees and overlooking the traffic below

notable_agents.action: sitting on a bench wearing a red jacket, facing away from the camera

entered.detail: tall illuminated skyscraper with multiple lit windows rising in the distance

segments.scene_description: The walkway curves along the building edge, offering an open view of the multi-lane street below with sparse traffic. A person in a red jacket sits on a bench to the right. The camera passes palm trees and glass railings as it follows the curved path, with towering skyscrapers visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: tiled pedestrian tunnel with industrial ceiling pipes

events.description: enters enclosed tunnel with orange tiled walls and artificial lighting
approaching tunnel exit with bright light visible at the end

agents.ego_description: walking through a long tunnel with orange tiled walls, passing advertisement posters on the walls

entered.detail: walls covered in square orange tiles with warm artificial lighting
exposed industrial pipes and ventilation ducts running along the tunnel ceiling
illuminated advertisement poster with 'BIOHAZARD 35Y6' text on the tiled wall
bright light source visible at the far end of the tunnel indicating the exit

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow enclosed tunnel with distinctive orange tiled walls and industrial ceiling pipes. The artificial lighting creates a warm amber glow. Advertisement posters line the walls as the camera moves steadily toward the bright exit light at the tunnel's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern elevated plaza with dramatic yellow neon lighting

events.description: exits tunnel into open plaza with striking vertical yellow neon light columns

agents.ego_description: walking through a modern plaza with yellow neon lights, pausing to look down at the street traffic below

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking along the street visible from the elevated position

entered.detail: tall vertical strip of intense yellow neon light rising from the plaza floor
open plaza area with geometric concrete patterns and reflective wet surfaces
glass safety railing overlooking the street level below

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the scene opens into a dramatic modern plaza featuring intense vertical yellow neon light columns. The camera moves through this architecturally striking space with geometric concrete surfaces, approaching a glass railing to overlook the multi-lane street below where sparse traffic and a distant pedestrian are visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a dim, enclosed stairwell into the vibrant, neon-lit heights of a futuristic city plaza. It begins by ascending concrete stairs under yellow-green artificial lighting before emerging onto an elevated, reflective walkway bathed in purple and pink neon. As the camera curves along the building's edge, the view expands to reveal palm trees, distant skyscrapers, and a person in a red jacket resting on a bench overlooking the city streets. The scene then shifts into a narrow tunnel with orange tiled walls and industrial pipes, moving through a warm amber glow toward a bright exit. Finally, the camera breaks out into a dramatic modern plaza defined by intense vertical yellow neon columns and geometric concrete surfaces, ending at a glass railing overlooking the multi-lane traffic below.
